Business Name: Arkansas Welcome Center at West Memphis
Description: Official ARDOT-listed welcome center/rest area on I-40 westbound at mile marker 278 in West Memphis, the first Arkansas stop after crossing the Mississippi River. Separate truck and passenger parking, 24/7 restrooms, water, picnic tables, WiFi and travel information.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Flying J Travel Center #607
Description: CAT Scale certified truck scale located at the Flying J Travel Center, I-40 Exit 280, West Memphis.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #429
Description: CAT Scale certified truck scale located at Pilot Travel Center #429 in the West Memphis truck-stop cluster (I-40 Exit 280 per directory sources).

Business Name: CAT Scale at Petro Stopping Center #311
Description: CAT Scale certified truck scale at the Petro Stopping Center, I-40 Exit 280 / I-55 Exit 4, West Memphis.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #450
Description: CAT Scale certified truck scale at Love's Travel Stop #450, West Memphis (I-40 Exit 280 per directory sources).

Business Name: CAT Scale at TA Earle
Description: CAT Scale certified truck scale at the TA Earle travel center, I-40 Exit 260.

Business Name: Southern Tire Mart #330
Description: Commercial truck tire dealer and service center on the I-40 north service road in West Memphis. New and retread commercial tires, 24/7 roadside tire service, air/hydraulic brake work, DOT inspections, wheel balancing and fleet inspections.

Business Name: Southern Tire Mart at Pilot Flying J
Description: Southern Tire Mart commercial tire shop located on-site at the Flying J Travel Center, I-40 Exit 280, West Memphis. Truck tire sales, repair and replacement for drivers using the Flying J complex.

Business Name: Love's Truck Care / Speedco #951
Description: 24-hour Love's Speedco truck lube and tire shop on Petro Rd in the West Memphis truck-stop cluster. Commercial tire sales and repair, oil changes, light mechanical work and emergency roadside assistance.

Business Name: Goodyear Commercial Tire & Service Centers #402
Description: Goodyear commercial truck tire and service center adjacent to Love's Travel Stop on Martin Luther King Dr in the West Memphis I-40/I-55 truck-stop cluster. Commercial tire sales, repair and fleet service.

Business Name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of West Memphis (Flying J)
Description: 24-hour Blue Beacon truck wash located by the Flying J Travel Center at I-40 Exit 280 / I-55 Exit 4 in West Memphis. Exterior washes, trailer washouts and related services.

Business Name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash (Petro West Memphis)
Description: Blue Beacon truck wash (listed as Blue Beacon of Memphis) located at the Petro Stopping Center complex on Petro Dr/Rd, West Memphis. Exterior truck and trailer washes.

Business Name: Crossroads Truck Wash & Polishing
Description: Independent hand truck wash in the Petro Rd truck-stop area of West Memphis. Hand washes, wheel and aluminum polishing, interior detail, hopper/dry van/end dump washouts, plus an on-site CB shop and radio repair.

Business Name: Comfort Suites West Memphis I-40 I-55
Description: Hotel at the I-40/I-55 junction in West Memphis with explicitly advertised free truck, bus and RV parking. Free hot breakfast, WiFi, indoor pool, fitness center and guest laundry.

Business Name: Days Inn by Wyndham Forrest City
Description: Budget hotel at I-40 Exit 241 in Forrest City with explicitly advertised free RV/bus/truck parking for vehicles of all sizes. Seasonal outdoor pool and free self parking.

Business Name: TA Truck Service - Petro West Memphis
Description: Fixed TA Truck Service repair facility with 6 truck service bays at the Petro Stopping Center, I-40 Exit 280 / I-55 Exit 4, West Memphis. Light mechanical, oil changes, tires and DOT-level maintenance.

Business Name: TA Truck Service - TA Earle
Description: Fixed TA Truck Service shop with 6 service bays at the TA Earle travel center, I-40 Exit 260. Truck alignment, DOT inspections, brake, HVAC and electrical service, J-PRO diagnostics, reefer services and road service dispatch.

Business Name: West Memphis Diesel & Truck Repair
Description: ASE-certified independent diesel truck repair shop in West Memphis with a fixed facility on Balfour Rd; offers diesel engine repair, brake repair and 24-hour roadside assistance/towing dispatch from the shop.

Business Name: Arkansas Highway Police Weigh Station - I-40 Eastbound (Lehi / West Memphis)
Description: AHP District 5 (Crittenden County) weigh station on I-40 eastbound near Lehi at approx. mile marker 273.5-274, serving traffic approaching West Memphis. HELD: confirmed by official ARDOT AHP weigh station map, but no civic street address available from official sources (mailing address is PO Box 2126, West Memphis, AR 72303).

Business Name: Arkansas Highway Police Weigh Station - I-40 Westbound (Riverside / West Memphis)
Description: AHP District 5 (Crittenden County) I-40 westbound weigh station (listed as Riverside) serving trucks entering Arkansas from Memphis. HELD: appears on official ARDOT AHP weigh station material, but no civic street address or confirmed mile marker available from official sources.

Business Name: Forrest City Rest Area - I-40 Eastbound (MM 235)
Description: State rest area on I-40 eastbound at mile marker 235 near Forrest City with separate truck parking, restrooms, water and picnic tables. HELD: listed in the official ARDOT welcome centers/rest areas PDF, but no civic street address is published by official sources.

Business Name: Forrest City Rest Area - I-40 Westbound (MM 242.6)
Description: State rest area on I-40 westbound at mile marker 242.6 near Forrest City with RV/truck parking, restrooms and vending. HELD: listed in the official ARDOT welcome centers/rest areas PDF, but no civic street address is published by official sources.

Business Name: PJ's Country Store (Jump Stop / Valero)
Description: Small independent truck stop at I-40 Exit 271 on US-70 near Lehi with about 25 truck parking spaces, deli/restaurant, trucker lounge and travel store. HELD: sources conflict on current branding (PJ's Country Store vs Jump Stop/Valero) and on city/ZIP (Lehi/Marion 72364 vs Proctor 72376); current operating status not confirmed by two consistent sources.

Business Name: Quality Inn West Memphis I-40
Description: Hotel on the I-40 service road in West Memphis. HELD: truck parking is claimed only by one source (Expedia lists RV/bus/truck parking); no second explicit truck-parking confirmation found, and sources conflict on E Service Rd vs S Service Rd address.

Business Name: Studio 6 Suites West Memphis
Description: Extended-stay motel on the I-40 west service road advertising truck parking. HELD: truck-parking confirmation comes only from the operator's own G6 Hospitality sites (studio6.com/motel6.com); no independent second source found.
